core_skills.name: Rapid Fire
core_skills.notes: Primary single-target damage skill. Used after applying crowd control or Vulnerable.

core_skills.name: Shadow Imbuement
core_skills.notes: Adds shadow explosion pressure and improves clearing when enemies are grouped.

core_skills.name: Dash
core_skills.notes: Used for repositioning, engaging, and escaping dangerous ground effects.

passive_skills.name: Exploit
passive_skills.notes: Improves damage against Healthy and Injured enemies.

aspects.name: Aspect of Repeating
aspects.notes: Supports Rapid Fire projectile behavior and improves main skill output.

aspects.name: Edgemaster's Aspect
aspects.notes: Rewards spending resources while near full resource.

aspects.name: Aspect of Might
aspects.notes: Provides a defensive layer after using a basic skill.

uniques.name: Condemnation
uniques.notes: Optional damage upgrade if the build uses Combo Points.

affix_priorities.notes: Prioritize consistent Rapid Fire scaling and Vulnerable target damage.
Needed to survive endgame boss mechanics and high-tier content.
Improves Shadow Imbuement uptime, repositioning, and resource comfort.

paragon_boards.name: Exploit Weakness
paragon_boards.purpose: Improves damage flow against Vulnerable enemies.

glyphs.name: Combat
glyphs.notes: Adds critical damage scaling for core skill output.

legendary_nodes.name: Exploit Weakness
legendary_nodes.notes: Selected because the build already focuses on Vulnerable damage windows.

author_notes: This sample build is manually structured for MVP testing and is not intended to be a real optimized d2core guide.
The build depends on keeping enemies Vulnerable and using Rapid Fire as the main damage button.
If survivability feels weak, prioritize defensive chest and pants affixes before chasing more damage.

ai_analysis_status.notes: Sample data only. Use this to test prompt generation.
